message:
fix: handle nullable workspace field in SQLite search results

Change the workspace field from String to Option<String> in search
query result mapping to properly handle SQLite NULL values with
unwrap_or_default(). Prevents panics when sessions lack workspace
metadata.

Adds test sqlite_backend_handles_null_workspace to validate the
edge case.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
